message:
feat(freeze): Add helpers for arithmetic opcode Zig codegen

- Add emitBinaryArithOp() helper for add/sub/mul with overflow handling
- Add emitDivOp() and emitModOp() helpers for division/modulo
- Convert .add, .sub, .mul, .div, .mod to use helpers
- Zig output uses:
  * qjs. prefix for all QuickJS functions
  * @intCast, @floatFromInt, @rem for type-safe operations
  * stack[@intCast(sp)] for array access
  * std.math.minInt/maxInt for bounds checking
- C output unchanged (backward compatible)
